search_rule.aperture_filter: at least one cyclic selected-symbol window realizes node 44
search_rule.atom_selector: first selected atom is x2 atom 7 and second selected atom is x1 atom 4
search_rule.carrier_scope: rooted simple carrier cycles of length 5 and 6 from carrier 12
search_rule.metric: same anchored rewrite trace metric as the aperture-cycle ranking
